zh.lifeSummary: 當Pain de Turberville於大約1265年出生在威爾士格拉莫爾根可迪時，他的父親Richard de Turberville31歲，母親Agnes Wilcock19歲。他於1287年與Gwenllian de Talbot在英國英格蘭賀福爾利哈達斯 卡素結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1318年1月18日在英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根可迪享年54歲，埋葬在威爾士格拉莫爾根可迪。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Pain de Turberville于大约1265年出生在威尔士格拉莫爾根可迪时，他的父亲Richard de Turberville31岁，母亲Agnes Wilcock19岁。他于1287年与Gwenllian de Talbot在英国英格兰賀福爾利哈達斯 卡素结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1318年1月18日在英国威尔斯格拉莫爾根可迪享年54岁，埋葬在威尔士格拉莫爾根可迪。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Turberville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name, probably from Thouberville (Eure), or possibly from Trubleville (Seine-Maritime), both in France. The two may have been confused in surname usage.

variants.name: Torbet
meanings: from the Anglo-Norman and Middle English personal name T(h)urbert, T(h)orbert, a hybrid of Old Norse Thorr ‘Thor’, the name of the god of thunder, + ancient Germanic -berht ‘bright, famous’. The name was probably formed on the Continent; see Turberville .
perhaps in some cases a nickname from Old French and Middle English turbot, turbut ‘turbot’, for someone who caught or sold or resembled this fish.

variants.name: Tuberville
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Turberville  . This form of the surname is very rare in Britain and Ireland.

variants.name: Turville
meanings: English (Surrey and Hampshire; of Norman origin):
habitational name from Tourville‐la‐Campagne (Eure, France). The placename derives from the Old Norse personal name Thórr + Old French ville ‘farmstead, estate’ (from Latin villa).
occasionally a shortened form of   Turberville  .

variants.name: Troublefield
meanings: Probably an altered form of   Turberville  .

nameMeanings.name: Pain
meanings: An old name derived from Latin paganus, a countryman, a peasant.

en.lifeSummary: When Pain de Turberville was born about 1265, in Coity, Glamorgan, Wales, his father, Richard de Turberville, was 31 and his mother, Agnes Wilcock, was 19. He married Gwenllian de Talbot in 1287, in Richard's Castle, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. He died on 18 January 1318, in Coity, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 54, and was buried in Coity, Glamorgan, Wales.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Pain de Turberville est né environ 1265, à Coity, Glamorgan, Galles, son père, Richard de Turberville, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Agnes Wilcock, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Gwenllian de Talbot en 1287, à Richard's Castle, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 18 janvier 1318, à Coity, Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterré à Coity, Glamorgan, Galles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Pain de Turberville um 1265 in Coity, Glamorgan, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard de Turberville 31 und seine Mutter Agnes Wilcock 19. Er hat 1287 in Richard's Castle, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom Gwenllian de Talbot geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 18. Januar 1318 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Coity, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom und wurde in Coity, Glamorgan, Wales begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Pain de Turberville è nato il circa 1265 nel Coity, Glamorgan, Galles, il suo padre, Richard de Turberville, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Wilcock, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Gwenllian de Talbot nel 1287, nel Richard's Castle, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì il 18 gennaio 1318, nel Coity, Glamorgan, Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 54 anni, e fu sepolto a Coity, Glamorgan, Galles.

ja.lifeSummary: Pain de Turbervilleが約1265年にウェールズグラモーガンコイトイで生まれた時，父Richard de Turbervilleは31歳，母Agnes Wilcockは19歳であった。1287年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアリチャード'ス カストルでGwenllian de Talbotと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1318年1月18日にイギリスウェールズグラモーガンコイトイで54歳で死去し，ウェールズグラモーガンコイトイにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Pain de Turberville(이)가 대략 1265년 웨일스 글램르건 코이티에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard de Turberville(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Wilcock(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1287년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 리처드'스 카스틀에서 Gwenllian de Talbot(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1318년 1월 18일 영국 웨일스 글램르건 코이티에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 웨일스 글램르건 코이티에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Pain de Turberville nasceu aproximadamente 1265, em Coity, Glamorgan, Gales, seu pai, Richard de Turberville, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Wilcock, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Gwenllian de Talbot em 1287, em Richard's Castle, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 18 de janeiro de 1318, em Coity, Glamorgan, Gales, United Kingdom, com 54 anos, e foi sepultado em Coity, Glamorgan, Gales.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Pain de Turberville родился около 1265 г. в местности коити, глэморган, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Richard de Turberville было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Agnes Wilcock, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Gwenllian de Talbot в 1287 г. в местности ричард'с кастл, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Он умер 18 января 1318 г. в местности коити, глэморган, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 54 лет и был похоронен в местности коити, глэморган, Уэльс.

Se casó con Gwenllian de Talbot en 1287, en Richard's Castle, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Murió el 18 de enero de 1318, en Coity, Glamorgan, Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 54 años, y fue sepultado en Coity, Glamorgan, Gales.
